title: galium verum subsp. wirtgenii
intro: Galium verum subsp. wirtgenii, also known as Wirtgen's bedstraw, is a subspecies of the Galium verum plant, a perennial herb belonging to the Rubiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Galium verum subsp. wirtgenii include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antiviral properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Galium verum subsp. wirtgenii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
